title: ムカつく気持ちは自主トレで

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin appears to be grouchier than usual.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nnngh, dammit! I'm gonna freakin' EXPLODE!
choice_data_list: What happened?
What happened?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Who cares what happened?! Ugh! Just thinking about it makes me mad!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I navigate through her ire, I manage to get
Narita Taishin to explain what's going on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, an Umamusume who lost to her at a
scrimmage recently mocked her for being small.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
She was all like, "You got lucky this time. But if
you don't get taller, you're not gonna be able to
keep this streak going, pipsqueak."

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Losing sucks—I get that. But talk about
bad sportsmanship.
choice_data_list: That's horrible.
That's horrible.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Seriously. I just can't catch a break... That's been
bugging me this whole time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Screw this! I'm gonna run laps till I drop today!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm heading to the track. Later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, she runs off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I meet up with Narita Taishin later and help her
train.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...
choice_data_list: Feel better?
Feel better?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not one bit. My blood's still boiling.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I knew a regular training session wouldn't be
enough for me. I'm gonna train some more, so you
go on ahead without me.
choice_data_list: I actually think you should call it a day.
I actually think you should call it a day.
Okay, but don't overdo it.
Okay, but don't overdo it.
Yeah! Go big or go home!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I knew a regular training session wouldn't be
enough for me. I'm gonna train some more, so you
go on ahead without me.
choice_data_list: I actually think you should call it a day.
I actually think you should call it a day.
Okay, but don't overdo it.
Okay, but don't overdo it.
Yeah! Go big or go home!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Excuse you? Why the heck would I do that?!
choice_data_list:
Because it'll be bad if you overexert yourself
and get sick.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But!
choice_data_list:
You'll just be proving that other Umamusume
right.

You'll just be proving that other Umamusume
right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her how resting properly and forgetting
about it is the best way to get back at her
opponent.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I guess you have a point.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Fine. I'll go home and get some sleep.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I hate following your advice, but I hate the idea
of her gloating over me even more.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'm out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Narita Taishin's anger has subsided
completely. It seems resting properly did her
some real good.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Don't overdo it? Pfft. Like half-assed training'll
do me any good.
choice_data_list:
You should channel that energy into your next
race.

You should channel that energy into your next
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Training to perfection and conquering her next
race will feel so much better than letting her
anger consume her now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon explaining this to Narita Taishin, a wicked
grin spreads across her face.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Is that permission to grind that stupid sore loser
under my heel and humiliate her in our next
scrimmage?
choice_data_list: Er, not exactly...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm gonna do it anyway. My rage won't stop
unless I do.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Sounds like a plan.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Just watch! I'm gonna make sure she never
trash-talks me again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her fighting spirit ablaze, Narita Taishin
devises a plan to put the sore loser in her place.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, duh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna feel any better with just a leisurely
jog around the park!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll run until I forget all about her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Raaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm feeling pretty good already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All right, one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's rage is potent fuel, and she
continues her solo training for a long while
afterward.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Argh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's not enough. I'm still mad as hell!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But I can't move anymore...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin burns herself out and sits there on
the spot, unable to stand...
